name: Penne with Artichoke Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice about 2/3 of the artichokes into small wedges; chop the remainder into paste. Set aside.
2. While cooking the pasta, saute onion and garlic in water until soft.
3. Add oregano, salt, and fresh-ground pepper to the pan.
4. Reduce heat to low and stir in white wine, lemon juice, spinach leaves (if desired), and reserved artichokes.
5. Simmer, stirring, until spinach is wilted and all ingredients are heated through (1-3 minutes).
6. Stir in ricotta cheese.
7. Drain the pasta and add it to the sauce. Turn off the heat and add lemon zest just before serving.
